# Punto Reforma Marbella

> Architecture and total renovations in Marbella — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Marbella — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

## Contact

- Website: https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 662 411 064
- Location: Marbella, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Marbella

## Blog Articles

- [Carpintería a medida en Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/carpinteria-a-medida-marbella/): Custom carpentry in Marbella: wardrobes, dressing rooms and bookshelves for villas and apartments. Marine-resistant materials and international-market finishes.
- [Licencia de obras en Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/licencia-obra-marbella/): Which permit you need to renovate in Marbella: comunicación previa, licencia de obra mayor and licencia de obra menor — process and timelines.
- [Pintura y acabados en Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/pintura-marbella-color-acabados/): How to choose paint and colour for your Marbella property. Surface prep, marine-climate finishes and what to expect from professionals.
- [Reforma de baño en comunidad Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-comunidad-marbella/): How to renovate a bathroom in a Marbella building. Gated community rules, urbanización permits, shared drainage and neighbour communication.
- [Precio reforma de baño en Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-marbella-precio/): Bathroom renovation prices in Marbella: scope-by-scope breakdown, premium materials for the international market, permits and timelines.
- [Precio reforma de cocina Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-marbella-precio/): Kitchen renovation prices in Marbella: price by size and scope, premium materials, open-plan layouts and realistic timelines.
- [Precio reforma integral Marbella 2026](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-marbella/): Full renovation costs in Marbella in 2026: price by quality level, technical project, permits and management for villas and apartments.
- [Reforma de piso en Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-marbella/): Practical guide to renovating a flat or apartment in Marbella: prices, timelines, permits and working with the community of owners.
- [Reforma de villa en Marbella](https://marbella.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-villa-marbella/): How to renovate a villa in Marbella: Golden Mile, Nueva Andalucía and La Zagaleta projects, exterior works, permits and premium finishes.
